purpose: Canonical table module contract for business/admin pages while the official Table/DataGrid primitive is not registered locally.

required_feedback: loading rows must not collapse column widths
empty state must preserve table context
permission denied must show readonly reason
partial bulk failures must expose affected row count

compact.target_rows_first_viewport: at least 7 rows on 1440x900 for query/list pages

default.target_rows_first_viewport: at least 5 rows on 1440x900 for detail/approval related tables

generation_policy: Do not present fallback table markup as an official Sanofi Elements Table primitive.
Each visible column must map to data-model-standard.json metadata.
Operation columns must be right aligned or visually isolated from business values.
Status columns must use content-standard.json approval/status copy.
If horizontal scroll is unavoidable, identity, status, numeric value, and action columns must remain discoverable without hiding context.
